## Use case

Who needs this and why?

## Proposed capability

Be concrete (SIP method, resource kind, API, ops workflow).

## Workarounds today

Kamailio/OpenSIPS module? External service?

## Priority guess

P1 / P2 / P3 / P4 / later — and why.
